schema.description: Request body for creating a contractor payment.

wage.description: If the contractor is on a fixed wage, this is the fixed wage payment for the contractor, regardless of hours worked.

hours.description: If the contractor is on an hourly wage, this is the number of hours that the contractor worked for the payment.

bonus.description: If the contractor is on an hourly wage, this is the bonus the contractor earned.

schema.title: Contractor-Payment-Body
